'''polanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twelfhynde|twelfhynde]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twelfhynde|twelfhynde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| polanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:polanithi|polanithi]] || [[word:polaniji|polaniji]] || [[word:polanishi|polanishi]] || [[word:polaniki|polaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:polanuthuthu|polanuthuthu]] || [[word:polanujuju|polanujuju]] || [[word:polanushushu|polanushushu]] || [[word:polanukuku|polanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:polanuthu|polanuthu]] || [[word:polanuju|polanuju]] || [[word:polanushu|polanushu]] || [[word:polanuku|polanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:polanufthuf|polanufthuf]] || [[word:polanufjuf|polanufjuf]] || [[word:polanufshuf|polanufshuf]] || [[word:polanufkuf|polanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:polanethe|polanethe]] || [[word:polaneje|polaneje]] || [[word:polaneshe|polaneshe]] || [[word:polaneke|polaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:polanothotho|polanothotho]] || [[word:polanojojo|polanojojo]] || [[word:polanoshosho|polanoshosho]] || [[word:polanokoko|polanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:polanotho|polanotho]] || [[word:polanojo|polanojo]] || [[word:polanosho|polanosho]] || [[word:polanoko|polanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:polanofthof|polanofthof]] || [[word:polanofjof|polanofjof]] || [[word:polanofshof|polanofshof]] || [[word:polanofkof|polanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:polanÃŸfthÃŸf|polanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfjÃŸf|polanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfshÃŸf|polanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfkÃŸf|polanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:polanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|polanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|polanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|polanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|polanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:polanÃŸfthÃŸf|polanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfjÃŸf|polanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfshÃŸf|polanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfkÃŸf|polanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:polanÃŸfthÃŸf|polanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfjÃŸf|polanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfshÃŸf|polanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:polanÃŸfkÃŸf|polanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:polanÃḊthÃḊ|polanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:polanÃḊjÃḊ|polanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:polanÃḊshÃḊ|polanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:polanÃḊkÃḊ|polanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:polanathatha|polanathatha]] || [[word:polanajaja|polanajaja]] || [[word:polanashasha|polanashasha]] || [[word:polanakaka|polanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:polanatha|polanatha]] || [[word:polanaja|polanaja]] || [[word:polanasha|polanasha]] || [[word:polanaka|polanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:polanafthaf|polanafthaf]] || [[word:polanafjaf|polanafjaf]] || [[word:polanafshaf|polanafshaf]] || [[word:polanafkaf|polanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:polanasha|polanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:polanshÃḋsha|polanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polanrosha|polanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polanmusha|polanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:polanyasha|polanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolankshÃḋsha|gopolankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolankrosha|gopolankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolankmusha|gopolankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolankyasha|gopolankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:polalanasha|polalanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:polalanshÃḋsha|polalanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polalanrosha|polalanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polalanmusha|polalanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:polalanyasha|polalanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolalankshÃḋsha|gopolalankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolalankrosha|gopolalankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolalankmusha|gopolalankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolalankyasha|gopolalankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pelÃḊnasha|pelÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pelÃḊnshÃḋsha|pelÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pelÃḊnrosha|pelÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pelÃḊnmusha|pelÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pelÃḊnyasha|pelÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopelÃḊnkshÃḋsha|gopelÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopelÃḊnkrosha|gopelÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopelÃḊnkmusha|gopelÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopelÃḊnkyasha|gopelÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:polfanasha|polfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:polfanshÃḋsha|polfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polfanrosha|polfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polfanmusha|polfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:polfanyasha|polfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolfankshÃḋsha|gopolfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolfankrosha|gopolfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolfankmusha|gopolfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolfankyasha|gopolfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
